name: Am I covered if I get hurt helping a coworker lift something heavy?
description: Yes. Injuries while helping coworkers (within job scope) are covered. No need to prove whose task it was—just that it happened at work.

mainEntity.name: Am I covered if I get hurt helping a coworker lift something heavy?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Injuries while helping coworkers (within job scope) are covered. No need to prove whose task it was—just that it happened at work.
